# Architecture

<!-- This file is generated by "go new-project" -->
<!-- Run: open Claude Code and type "go new-project" to fill this in -->

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology | Why |
|---|---|---|
| Frontend | Next.js 15 | App Router, SSR, TypeScript |
| Backend | Express | Lightweight, TypeScript native |
| Database | Supabase | PostgreSQL + Auth + Storage |
| Monorepo | Turborepo | Build caching, workspace management |

## Data Model

<!-- Main entities and their relationships -->

```
Entity A
  - field1: type
  - field2: type

Entity B
  - field1: type
  - field2: type (FK → Entity A)
```

## API Design

### Main routes

```
GET  /api/health           → Health check
GET  /api/<resource>       → List
POST /api/<resource>       → Create
GET  /api/<resource>/:id   → Get one
PUT  /api/<resource>/:id   → Update
DELETE /api/<resource>/:id → Delete
```

## Folder Structure

```
apps/frontend/src/
├── app/
│   ├── (auth)/       # Authentication pages
│   ├── api/          # API proxy
│   └── page.tsx      # Home
├── components/       # UI components
├── hooks/            # Custom hooks
└── stores/           # Zustand state

apps/backend/src/
├── routes/           # Express routes
├── services/         # Business logic
├── middleware/        # Auth, validation
└── config/           # DB, env config
```

## Security

- All inputs validated with zod
- Auth via Supabase JWT
- Rate limiting on sensitive endpoints
- No secrets in code — env vars only
